body.title: docs/ -> press_releases/ triage PROPOSAL (awaiting Akien) — T-docs-to-press-releases
body.status: AWAITING AKIEN — do not execute migrations/freezes until reviewed (ticket gate: 'expensive to misfile')
body.text:
# docs/ -> press_releases/ triage proposal (T-docs-to-press-releases)

The ticket REQUIRES surfacing this list to Akien before executing any rename/migrate/freeze (MEDIUM inertia; cross-refs in skills/CLAUDE.md/README must update for KEEP/MIGRATE files). Akien away 2026-06-28 -> proposal prepared, EXECUTION DEFERRED. Akien's pre-specified anchors honored.

## KEEP (human-facing -> stays in the renamed press_releases/)
- TheoryOfOperation.md (Akien anchor: KEEP)
- memory_architecture.md (Akien anchor: KEEP)
- Deterministic_AI_Development_Levers_A_layer_on_top_of_skills.md (essay, Akien byline)
- QE_in_the_Age_of_AI.md (essay, Akien byline)
- working_together.md (field-notes philosophy, Akien byline)
- framework_overview.md (onboarding overview, human-facing)
- getting_started.md (onboarding, human-facing)
- the_ownership_gap/ (all 8: Opening, CompiledInference, Levers, WorkflowAuditsModels, Skills, Platform, WhatWeBuilt, README — a human-facing essay series)

## MIGRATE (dev artifact -> devlab/runtime/memory/<subdir> via memory_emit.py)
- design_patterns_inventory.md -> design_patterns/ (Akien anchor: canonical subdir is design_patterns, NOT patterns)
- dicksimnel_parity.md -> notes/ (DS/CC parity tracking, dev-process artifact)
- GlobalKB.md -> architecture/ (Global KB subsystem doc — candidate intention-point; relates to the 2026-06-28 global_kb move under installer)
- rewind_output_contracts.md -> notes/ (Workstream 1 of D-rewind-as-workflow-primitive)
- state_inventory.md -> notes/ (Workstream 2 of D-rewind, durability audit)
- security_known_limitations.md -> notes/ (Murderbot threat model — living reference; consider a security/ subdir if one is wanted)
- crash_safe_sessions.md -> notes/ (concept still relevant BUT flagged: 'DB references reflect old pattern' — migrate with a staleness note, or FREEZE if fully superseded — ASK AKIEN)

## FREEZE (dead -> ~/TheIgorsProject)
- html_spec_template.html (Akien anchor: confirmed dead, 0 code refs)
- skills_intention_review_20260623.md (Akien anchor: FREEZE)
- skills_harmony_recommendation_20260622.md (Akien anchor: FREEZE)
- design_audit_2026-06-17.md (point-in-time audit of the RETIRED devlab/design_docs/decisions/ path — dead review)
- palace_schema.md (Shared Palace design doc — palace is RETIRED; already allowlisted as legacy in the lab/ ref-sweep)

## Open questions for Akien
1. crash_safe_sessions.md — MIGRATE-with-staleness-note vs FREEZE? (the DB pattern it describes is superseded by the IMAP/bus path).
2. security_known_limitations.md — notes/ vs a dedicated security/ subdir under the store?
3. GlobalKB.md — straight MIGRATE to architecture/, or rewrite as a proper intention-point (like cc.0.installer)?
4. After rename, ALL `docs/<file>` references in skills/, CLAUDE.md, README must be repointed for KEEP+MIGRATE files (grep before executing).
